name: Tom - homeless wolfboy
description:
A homeless Wolfboy wants to kill you for revenge, but you have nothing to do with this village, nor with his story. Safe yourself in this medieval fantasy setting. 

---- 
**Otome system included**

Only tested with OpenAi GPT 3.5 and 4.
Change your Main prompt if he isn't how you want him to be. It's all about your Prompt.  Only works with 8000+ context size.

You should go and find out more about his story and generally what is going on. If you don't want to spoil yourself, just get into this and don't read the character. Have fun! 

Join my discord server!
https://discord.gg/cd9YyHUzzj
creator: RavenSama
